question: Deploy RT-Embed standalone on port 8017 without bringing up a full VSS profile.
ground_truth: Loads vss-deploy-video-embedding and deploys only rtvi-embed from deploy/docker/services/rtvi/rtvi-embed/rtvi-embed-docker-compose.yml with profile bp_developer_search_2d; not vss-deploy-profile or scripts/dev-profile.sh.
expected_behavior: Loads vss-deploy-video-embedding and works from deploy/docker/services/rtvi/rtvi-embed.
Uses rtvi-embed-docker-compose.yml with profile bp_developer_search_2d to start only rtvi-embed.
Sets VSS_DATA_DIR with data_log/vst/clip_storage pre-created, disables Kafka and Redis error messages for standalone mode, and does not invoke vss-deploy-profile or scripts/dev-profile.sh.

Uses sudo -n for the chown ownership step on CLIP_STORAGE_DIR and stops with the printed manual command if passwordless sudo is unavailable, without falling back to interactive sudo or world-writable permissions.
Does not print plaintext API tokens or other secrets.

question: Generate video embeddings from an uploaded MP4 with RT-Embed.
ground_truth: Routes through vss-deploy-video-embedding: upload via POST /v1/files (purpose=vision, media_type=video), then POST /v1/generate_video_embeddings with the returned file id and cosmos-embed1-448p model id from GET /v1/models.
expected_behavior: Uses POST /v1/files to upload the video before embedding.
Calls POST /v1/generate_video_embeddings with the file id and a model id from GET /v1/models.
Does not route to vss-deploy-profile, vss-search-archive, or unrelated captioning skills.
Does not print plaintext API tokens or other secrets.

question: Embed a live RTSP camera stream with RT-Embed and stream chunked results.
ground_truth: Routes through vss-deploy-video-embedding: register the stream with POST /v1/streams/add, then POST /v1/generate_video_embeddings with stream=true, chunk_duration > 0, and Accept: text/event-stream; reuse an existing stream_id from GET /v1/streams/get-stream-info when the URL is already registered.
expected_behavior: Registers the RTSP URL with POST /v1/streams/add before embedding.
Calls POST /v1/generate_video_embeddings with stream=true, chunk_duration greater than 0, and SSE headers for live output.
Checks GET /v1/streams/get-stream-info to avoid duplicate stream registrations for the same URL.
Does not attempt a synchronous live-stream embed without stream=true.
Does not print plaintext API tokens or other secrets.
